creator: shuvaev@physik.uni-wuerzburg.de
text:
Take maintainership.
Resolve conflict with graphics/ImageMagick (both ports install the same
file 'stream' into ${PREFIX}/bin).
The version of the program is really 5.8 (one should look into stream.c).
Some no-op changes (committer could review and reject them).

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
